title: changing a single constant causes Verilator to crash
body:
I'm trying to generate SC output from Verilator (Verilator 5.013 devel rev v5.012-63-g3454641) 
with 
verilator --debug --sc --timing -Wno-lint --top ce $^

I have a generate for loop ala:

    generate
        for (g = 0; g < 1; g = g+1) begin: gen_mul_acc

My problem is that when the loop check is 1 as above I get 

- V3Ast.cpp:1217:     Dumping obj_dir/Vce_990_final.tree
- Verilator.cpp:779:  Done, Exiting...

But when the same line reads "g < 128" 

I get 

- V3Ast.cpp:1217:     Dumping obj_dir/Vce_035_const.tree
- V3Scope.cpp:421:    scopeAll:
%Error: export VERILATOR_ROOT=
%Error: ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /remote/global/freeware/verilator/5.013/bin/verilator_bin_dbg --debug --sc --timing -Wno-lint --top ce /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/icg.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/ce.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/adder_tree.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/accum.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/DCIM_TOP.sv
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /remote/global/freeware/verilator/5.013/bin/verilator_bin_dbg --debug --sc --timing -Wno-lint --top ce /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/icg.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/ce.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/adder_tree.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/accum.sv /projects/kal/projects/hw/ip/cim/DCIM_TOP.sv
